content: Resume bullets: Use CAR method (Action Verb + Task + Result with metrics). Lead with Led, Managed, Developed, Coordinated.
Tailor resume to job description: extract keywords, mirror language, reorder bullets by relevance, customize summary with company/role.
ATS optimization: standard headings (Experience, Education, Skills), no tables/columns, spell out acronyms first, use .docx or text-based PDF.
Cover letter structure: Opening interest, key qualifications (bullets), alignment with role, closing. Keep concise.
source: BC Hydro project - generated cover letters

content: For FortisBC/utility roles: emphasize natural gas infrastructure, CSA Z662, consultant oversight, regulated utility experience, budget management.
